title: simplywire - Dish Drainer - Anti Rust Drying Rack – Cutlery Basket - Black Plastic Coated Steel
features: SMART DESIGN: This solid metal dishrack holds 10 large plates, has a removable plastic cutlery holder for utensils and is designed to fit most draining boards.
SPACE SAVING: A sturdy sink organiser to maximise your crockery drying options. This spacious but well-proportioned drainer allows your washing up to drip dry quickly.
HYGIENIC: The antislip plastic feet will protect your sink surfaces whilst providing stable storage and air flow under your glasses, cups, bowls, small pots, and pans.
STRONG AND DURABLE: Anti-rust black coated steel wire provides a robust holder for your plates, chopping boards, pan lids or baking trays in a vertical, easy access way.
MEASUREMENTS: 44.6cm (Length) x 29.5cm (Width) x 12.5cm (Height). No assembly required
description: Product Description Quality Commitment At simplywire, our focus is on producing a range of quality products and bespoke designs for modern living. Quality materials, production and service are at the heart of everything that we do. Product Description Expertly Designed Our stylish simplywire dish drainers are the ideal way to dry dishes and other tableware items. This stylish unit includes ten plate slots and an easy clean removable cutlery basket ensuring you can dry your kitchen utensils quickly and effortlessly. It has plastic feet which help prevent any surface scratching as well as providing additional stability. Masterfully Crafted simplywire partners with highly respected manufacturers from around the world. We love our products and we test them rigorously to make sure they perform perfectly. We believe it is our responsibility to source and create the best products to ensure they are safe and long-lasting whilst remaining stylish and practical. Stylish Storage This dish drainer design is suitable for tableware of all sizes and can maximise usage of sink areas. The drying rack can accommodate up to 10 plates and numerous glasses, cups and mugs. Available in a range of different colours that compliment all decors and styles, these units are the perfect addition to your kitchen sink area. Easy Cleaning The unit is designed with easy clean properties and can be wiped clean with a soft cloth. Do not use abrasive cleaners. Please note that the tableware items shown in the picture are for marketing purposes and not included.
